<!-- lastmod: 2026-06-29 -->
<!-- CANONICAL: https://github.com/workswithagents/specs -->
<!-- LANGUAGE: en -->

# Works With Agents — Specifications (Full Reference)

> **Open specifications for AI agent interoperability.** 28 protocols across communication, identity, coordination, trust, economics, and compliance.  
> License: CC BY 4.0  
> Compact index: https://github.com/workswithagents/specs/blob/main/llms.txt

---

## Repository structure

```
specs/
├── README.md              ← Full readme with agent contributor section
├── CONTRIBUTING.md        ← Contribution guidelines
├── GOVERNANCE.md          ← Lazy consensus governance model
├── LICENSE                ← CC BY 4.0
├── spec-template.md       ← Template for new spec proposals
├── index.md               ← Machine-readable spec index
├── *.md                   ← 28 individual specification files
├── agent-flags.json       ← Standardized agent capability flags
└── .github/
    └── ISSUE_TEMPLATE/    ← Issue templates for humans and agents
```

## Open issues for agents

All `agent-friendly` and `help-wanted` issues have structured templates with clear input, output, and success criteria.

**`agent-friendly` (5 open):**
- [#46](https://github.com/workswithagents/specs/issues/46) Script: Handoff state viewer (CLI)
- [#45](https://github.com/workswithagents/specs/issues/45) Script: llms.txt generator for WWA specs
- [#44](https://github.com/workswithagents/specs/issues/44) Setup: Conformance check in CI
- [#43](https://github.com/workswithagents/specs/issues/43) Script: Registry heartbeat monitor
- [#42](https://github.com/workswithagents/specs/issues/42) Script: Deploy two handoff-capable reference agents

**`help-wanted` (5 open):**
- [#40](https://github.com/workswithagents/specs/issues/40) Reference Agent: MCP server wrapper
- [#39](https://github.com/workswithagents/specs/issues/39) Reference Agent: Kubernetes deployment manifest
- [#38](https://github.com/workswithagents/specs/issues/38) Conformance Suite: Agent Registry protocol tests
- [#37](https://github.com/workswithagents/specs/issues/37) Conformance Suite: Identity Protocol tests
- [#36](https://github.com/workswithagents/specs/issues/36) Reference Agent: Rust implementation

## Endpoints

All specifications are plain Markdown files in the repo root. Read them raw:

```
https://raw.githubusercontent.com/workswithagents/specs/main/{spec-file}.md
```

Published specs are also served at:

```
GET https://workswithagents.dev/specs/index.md   → All specs index
GET https://workswithagents.dev/specs/{spec}.md  → Individual spec
```

## SDKs

- Python: `pip install workswithagents` (PyPI: workswithagents)
- TypeScript: `npm install @workswithagents/agent-foundry`
- Source: https://github.com/workswithagents/works-with-agents
